notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Cam Smith batting, Yainer Diaz picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Austin Wells out at 2nd. Ryan McMahon out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to first baseman Christian Walker. Austin Wells out at 3rd. José Caballero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to first baseman Christian Walker. Austin Wells out at 3rd. José Caballero out at 1st.
